error_signature: JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON parameter in Blogger node
symptom: When attempting to run a workflow that uploads to Blogger, an error message states 'JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON'. The JSON appears correct in the expression screen but fails during execution.
not_this_if: JSON is correctly formatted and passes validation
root_cause: The error occurs because the JSON being passed to the Blogger node is not properly formatted. Specifically, the content field needs to be a valid JSON string, which can be achieved using JSON.stringify to ensure it is correctly serialized.
fix_steps: Modify the JSON structure in the Blogger node settings
Use JSON.stringify on the content field to ensure it is valid JSON
agent_instruction: Ensure the content field is serialized using JSON.stringify to create valid JSON.
